title: HUST-OBC raw dataset
provider: Huazhong University of Science and Technology research team / Scientific Data
access_method: Downloaded via figshare ndownloader after source and rights review; raw package kept outside regular Git.
handling_strategy: Commit only metadata-only undeciphered candidate index and first 7700 packet scaffolds; do not commit raw images.
risk_note: Raw package exceeds 40 MiB and is not committed. Figshare metadata reports CC BY 4.0, while the Scientific Data article page uses CC BY-NC-ND 4.0. Article reports 9411 undeciphered characters; zip directory yielded 9408 candidate classes.

title: OBIMD raw multimodal dataset
provider: Key Laboratory of Oracle Bone Inscriptions Information Processing Anyang Normal University and collaborators / Scientific Data / Hugging Face
access_method: Use Hugging Face dataset card and Scientific Data article; do not bulk download raw image files until size review.
storage_hint: external Hugging Face dataset pending size review
handling_strategy: Use as candidate large source for image-level, sentence-level and character-level OBI context records; extract metadata and field maps before raw images.
risk_note: Dataset card reports CC-BY 4.0, but GitHub README wording is narrower and raw image package is large; do not commit directly.

title: EVOBC raw evolution dataset
provider: Yuliang Liu research group / Open-Oracle / arXiv
access_method: Follow linked dataset repositories and paper data availability; do not bulk download until rights and size review.
storage_hint: external dataset links pending source-chain review
handling_strategy: Use as candidate source for graph/evolution-chain experiments after source and rights review.
risk_note: Large AI/evolution dataset; useful for experiments but not a primary paleographic authority by itself.
